Description of the table DIM_DATE

Please take ALL columns available in oryginal table
select * from "SDD"."COMMON"."DIM_DATE_SDD"

CKT_DIM_DATE


Server validation rule of the table DIM_DATE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DIM_DATE

drop index DIM_DATE_PK;

drop table DIM_DATE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DIM_DATE
--==============================================================
create table DIM_DATE (
DIM_DATE_KEY "INTEGER" not null,
CALENDAR_DATE "DATE",
primary key (DIM_DATE_KEY)
);

--==============================================================
-- Index: DIM_DATE_PK
--==============================================================
create unique index DIM_DATE_PK on DIM_DATE (
DIM_DATE_KEY ASC
);
